name: Chocolate Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix crumbled cookies, cinnamon, and melted butter.
3. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. Increase oven temperature to 350°F.
6. Beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Blend in sour cream and vanilla.
9. Divide the batter into two equal parts.
10. Mix chocolate chips into one part of the batter.
11. Mix liqueur and orange peel into the remaining batter.
12. Pour the chocolate layer batter over the crust.
13. Bake for 30 minutes.
14. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F.
15. Spoon the remaining batter over the chocolate layer.
16. Continue baking for another 30 minutes.
17. Turn off the oven and prop open the door; remove the cheesecake when it has cooled.
18. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan.
() I've recently discovered Oreo cookie crumbs in a box, which is a great time saver for those who want to simplify the process.
